case_number: Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 86 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 07.02.2023 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the applicants through statement files certified copy of judgment dated 01.02.2023, passed by the learned Judge, Anti- Terrorism Court, Naushahro Feroze in Special Case No.42 of 2022 (Re: The State v. Asad Ali and others) and states that since the applicants have been acquitted of the charge, under instructions, he does not press instant Criminal Bail Application as the same has become infructuous. Accordingly, instant Criminal Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
